name: Avalo Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Avalo Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing IL-1-based treatments for immune-mediated inflammatory diseases. Its lead product candidate, abdakibart (AVTX-009), a monoclonal antibody targeting interleukin-1, is in a Phase 2 clinical trial for hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). The company has no approved products and has not generated product revenue.

exposures.sentence: Our lead product candidate, abdakibart (AVTX-009), an anti-IL-1 monoclonal antibody ( mAb ) is in a Phase 2 clinical trial for hidradenitis suppurativa ( HS ).

catalysts.event: Phase 2 LOTUS trial topline data readout
catalysts.sentence: Our current focus is on completing the Phase 2 ( LOTUS ) trial evaluating abdakibart (AVTX-009) in HS, preparing for the anticipated topline data readout in the second quarter of 2026, and planning for our Phase 3 trial(s).

tamClaims.claim: The global HS market is expected to grow to $10 billion by 2035.
tamClaims.sentence: The global HS market is expected to grow to $10 billion by 2035.
